name: Sun-Dried Tomato, Garlic, & Jalapeno Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup sun-dried tomatoes, oil-packed, finely chopped
1/2 pound lasagna noodles, broken into bite-size pieces, or wide egg noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy skillet, cook the garlic and shallot in oil and butter over moderately low heat, stirring for 5 minutes.
2. Add tomatoes, jalapeños, and salt to taste, and cook the mixture, stirring occasionally, for 20 minutes.
3. Gradually add lasagna noodles (or wide egg noodles) to a kettle of boiling salted water, stirring, and boil until tender.
4. Drain pasta in a colander and rinse briefly under hot water.
5. Add pasta and parsley to the skillet and toss mixture well.
6. Serve pasta with Parmesan.
